home.subtitle: A passionate web developer with 2+ years of experience, building modern and high-performance applications with Laravel, React and Next.js.

about.title: Crafting robust
about.description: Over 2 years ago, I began my journey as a web developer. Since then, I have built full-stack applications, worked with startups and agencies, and developed strong expertise in Laravel, React, and Next.js.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: From back-end development with Laravel to building React/Next.js interfaces — I cover the full lifecycle of your web project.
services.webdev_desc: Full-stack web applications built with Laravel (PHP) for a solid and secure back-end.
services.react_desc: Dynamic and reactive user interfaces with React for a smooth and modern experience.
services.nextjs_desc: Optimized Next.js applications with server-side rendering for top performance and SEO.
services.api_desc: Design and development of robust RESTful APIs with Laravel to connect your services.
services.optim_desc: Audit and performance improvement for your existing applications, database included.

work.title: My work
work.subtitle: A selection of projects built with Laravel, React and Next.js — from robust back-ends to modern interfaces.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from people I've had the pleasure to work with.
testimonials.t1_message: A serious and responsive developer. He delivered our Laravel application on time with clean, well-structured code. Highly recommended!
testimonials.t2_message: Excellent work on our Next.js redesign. Performance has multiplied and SEO has improved significantly. Very professional.
testimonials.t3_message: He turned our idea into a real web application with a Laravel API and an impeccable React front-end. Top collaboration from start to finish.

contact.title: Let's work
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss it and build something great together.
